payload:
# Office of Accountability — Implementation Prompt

## Objective

Build a civic knowledge platform for Argentine politics as an interactive graph explorer. The platform links politicians, votes, legislation, donors, promises, and user-contributed research into a single explorable, queryable system powered by Neo4j and deployed on Cloudflare Workers via Vinext.

## Stack

- **Frontend + API + SSR:** Vinext (App Router, Server Components, Route Handlers) → Cloudflare Workers
- **Database:** Ne... [truncated, 7860 chars total]
Step 1.1: Delete static case route folders webapp/src/app/caso/caso-epstein/ and webapp/src/app/caso/finanzas-politicas/ — these are shadowed by the unified /caso/[slug] dynamic route
Step 1 complete: deleted static case route folders caso-epstein/ and finanzas-politicas/ (14 files, 3218 lines). Typecheck passes clean.
Step 1 cleanup of static case routes verified. 14 files deleted correctly, [slug] dynamic route intact. 3 pre-existing engine type errors noted (not from this change).
Step 1 (static route cleanup) complete and reviewed. Advancing to Step 2: browser language detection + bilingual page titles/metadata. Task task-1774074000-i18n is open.
Step 2 decomposed into 6 sub-tasks. First: task-1774118546-ea0a — Create webapp/src/lib/i18n.ts with detectLang utility and SITE_META bilingual strings map
task-1774118546-ea0a: Created webapp/src/lib/i18n.ts with detectLang(acceptLanguage) returning en|es and SITE_META bilingual strings. Typecheck passes. Commit 9cb5762.
Sub-task 2.1 (i18n.ts): detectLang + SITE_META verified. Typecheck clean. No issues.
